description: A perfect fusion of cool vintage style and practicality, the Ascoli-Fossick shoe from skechers is a fashionable casual sneaker that is a must-have in your wardrobe. Upper Smooth leather upper with suede overlays and smooth fabric lining Mesh panels on the midfoot and backfoot with honeycomb style texture, and perforations on the forefoot for breathability Slimline suede and mesh tongue Padded collar and footbed for all-day comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Midsole Shock absorbing PU midsole Outsole Soccer inspired flexible outsole made of durable rubber, with terraced lugs and pyramid points for enhanced traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
